title: Red Rum: The Horse That Captured Britain
subtitle: 红朗姆：征服英国的传奇赛马

paragraphs.en: In the history of horse racing, few horses have captured the affection of the British public like Red Rum. Today, three decades after his retirement, he is still one of the best-known and most beloved racehorses of all time. Red Rum was passed around to several owners before being purchased for Noel Le Mar. The agent who made the purchase was the now-legendary horse trainer Donald Ginger McCain.
paragraphs.zh: 在赛马史上，很少有马匹能像“红朗姆”那样赢得英国公众的喜爱。如今，在他退役三十年后，他仍然是有史以来最著名、最受爱戴的赛马之一。红朗姆在被诺埃尔·勒马尔购得之前，曾辗转于多位主人之间。促成这次购买的经纪人是如今已成为传奇驯马师的唐纳德·“金杰”·麦凯恩。

words.meaning: adj. 传奇的，大名鼎鼎的

paragraphs.en: It wasn't apparent at the time, but Red Rum had a serious bone disease in his foot. For many horses and many trainers this would mean the end of a racing career before it even began. For Ginger and Red Rum, though, it was just an obstacle to greatness that had to be overcome. Red Rum's true talent came out in steeplechases. His power, speed and jumping ability carried him to his first Grand National title in 1973. The very next year, Red Rum returned to take his second title.
paragraphs.zh: 当时并不明显，但红朗姆的脚部患有严重的骨病。对许多马匹和许多驯马师来说，这意味着赛马生涯还未开始就已结束。然而对金杰和红朗姆而言，这只是通往伟大道路上必须克服的一个障碍。红朗姆的真正天赋在障碍赛中展现出来。他的力量、速度和跳跃能力助他在1973年首次夺得英国全国大赛冠军。第二年，红朗姆重返赛场，夺得第二个冠军。

words.meaning: adj. 明显的，显而易见的

paragraphs.en: He was the first horse to take successive firsts since Reynoldstown in 1935-1936. Red Rum's spirit and grace had already begun to charm the leagues of Grand National fans. In the following two years, Red Rum lost out on the title, coming in second both times. When he returned in 1977 to try again, he was largely regarded as past his prime. He was 12 years old and not expected to place highly.
paragraphs.zh: 他是自1935至1936年的雷诺兹敦以来第一匹连续夺冠的马。红朗姆的精神与优雅早已开始迷倒大批全国大赛的粉丝。在随后两年里，红朗姆与冠军失之交臂，两次均获亚军。当他1977年再次参赛时，人们普遍认为他已过巅峰期。他当时12岁，没人指望他能取得好名次。

words.meaning: n. 全盛时期，巅峰状态

paragraphs.en: He surprised sporting fans around the world when he came in a remarkable 25 lengths ahead of the nearest horse, taking his third Grand National win. To this day, Red Rum's third win is known as one of the greatest moments in horse racing history. Red Rum was headed for the Grand National once again in 1978 but suffered an injury in one of his heels shortly before the race. He was retired soon after, but his public life and fame by no means decreased with the end of his career. Red Rum traveled all over the country for various engagements. He often led pre-race parades at Aintree Racecourse and was a popular guest at charity benefits and public events.
paragraphs.zh: 当他以领先最近的马25个马位的惊人优势冲过终点，夺得第三个全国大赛冠军时，全世界的体育迷都为之震惊。时至今日，红朗姆的第三次夺冠仍被誉为赛马史上最伟大的时刻之一。1978年，红朗姆再次向全国大赛发起冲击，但在赛前不久一只后跟受伤。他很快便退役了，但他的公众生活和声望并未因职业生涯的结束而有丝毫减退。红朗姆在全国各地参加各类活动，常在安特里赛马场引领赛前巡游，也是慈善募捐和公共活动中的热门嘉宾。

words.meaning: adj. 非凡的，引人注目的
